title: Fast Quit
description: Leave the Server/World with a custom keybind (REALY FAST) 🎮✨
body:

## 🎮✨🚪 **Leave the Server/World with a Custom Keybind** 🎯⚡  

You can quickly exit the current server or world by pressing a custom keybind ⌨️💨  
By default, this key is set to **"G"** 🟢, but you can change it to any key you prefer in the controls/settings menu ⚙️🛠️  

### **__How it works:__** 🧠👇  
- 👉 Press **G** → instantly leave the server or world 🚀🌍❌  
- 👉 No need to open menus manually 🙅‍♂️📂  
- 👉 Saves time and makes navigation smoother ⏱️✨🧭  

# **__Customization:__** 🎨🔧  
If you don’t like the default key 😅, simply go to your keybind settings ⚙️ and assign a different key that feels more comfortable for you 🖐️💡🎯  

# ❓ Can I use this mod in a modpack? 📦

***Of course! Please feel free to include this mod in your modpacks!*** 💜✨

You may:

* ✅ Use this mod in public and private modpacks
* ✅ Upload modpacks containing this mod to Modrinth, CurseForge, etc.
* ✅ Use it on servers and with friends

Just please:

* ❌ Do not reupload the mod itself
* ❌ Do not claim the mod as your own

Have fun! 🌟
